title: Kyle's lambda t-value microstructure feature (LdP's preferred 2nd-gen feature)
source: LdP newer-corpus verification (4 parallel read-only agents over the added 2012-2026 papers + LdP REFERENCE CODE in D:/PROJECTS/QuantTradingDocs/code, 2026-06-03). Conversation: 'verifica la nueva informacion antes de implementar'.
why: Lecture08 'Useful Financial Features' contains LdP's single most explicit feature-engineering steer (AFML §19.4, line 6866): 'the t-values associated with these microstructural estimates are MORE informative than the (mean) estimates themselves... rescaled by the std of the estimation error.' This points at Kyle's lambda (price impact = slope of dP on signed volume b_t*V_t) reported as a T-VALUE — ahead of the raw Amihud ratio (B0136). Cheap on D1 (one rolling regression; aggressor sign via tick rule on close-to-close). Opens an order-flow/impact dimension absent today.
value_rationale: Higher-signal than Amihud per LdP's own guidance; cheap; orthogonal order-flow dimension. Should outrank B0136 in implementation order.
scope: Rolling regression dP_t ~ lambda*(b_t*V_t); b_t = sign(close_t - close_{t-1}) (tick rule); expose the t-VALUE of lambda, not the raw slope
Label volume as tick-volume proxy on XAU (MT5 volume = tick count)
Causal: rolling window only, no full-sample fit
Compare MDA/CFI vs Amihud (B0136) and the current set
recommendation: Implement ahead of B0136; it is LdP's preferred microstructure feature. Pair: also emit Amihud as a t-value.
out_of_scope: VPIN (H4-only, needs intraday volume clock). Hasbrouck lambda (needs TAQ/Gibbs).

history.reason: verification: Kyle lambda t-value is LdP's preferred microstructure feature, ahead of Amihud

quant-phd-advisor verdict 2026-06-03: KILL. On bar closes b_t=sign(close.diff)=sign(dp), so the regression dp~lambda*(sign(dp)*V) is sign-aligned by construction -> lambda t-value biased POSITIVE; on a no-real-volume CFD it is a disguised |dp|~V volatility ratio (Amihud-flavored), not order-flow impact. Lit (OFI arXiv 2508.06788; VPIN Easley-LdP-OHara) says even the real-volume version is volatility/toxicity, not directional. The legitimate real-signed-trade-volume construction is folded into B0147. microstructure.py functions kept as B0147 building blocks.
feat(features): B0134 fractionally-differentiated log-price (FFD, AFML Ch5) + expert-guided backlog
